title: Miracle-Gro® Drip & Feed All Purpose - 32ml
description: Product description Convenient plant food that releases over 4 weeksPerfect for pots, containers and hanging basketsEasy to use indoors or outdoorsIdeal for those new to growing and more experienced gardeners alike Directions Apply 32ml directly to soil, indoors or outdoors. Suitable for organic gardening. Safety Warning Keep out of reach of children and pets. Avoid contact with skin and eyes. If ingested, seek medical advice immediately. Store in a cool, dry place away from heat and open flames. Do not use on food crops. Manufacturer Contact Information Evergreen Garden Care UK, 1 Archipelago, Lyon Way, Frimley, Surrey, GU16 7ER.
